description: You are a security systems integrator commissioning a new VMS installation for a retail facility. Log in to the Nx Witness Web Admin at https://localhost:7001/static/index.html (credentials: admin / Admin1234!). Configure the recording schedules for all seven days of the week for the following cameras: 'Parking Lot Camera' (Tier 1: continuous recording, always-on mode, 25 fps, high quality), 'Entrance Camera' (Tier 1: continuous recording, always-on mode, 15 fps, high quality), and 'Server Room Camera' (Tier 2: motion-triggered recording only, 10 fps, low quality). Create a monitoring layout named 'Security Operations Center' that displays all three cameras.
